name: CA Warp
description: Deep warp — CA organisms bend space itself
code:
// Deep warp — CA organisms bend space itself
caStream('amoeba').out(o1)

noise(3, 0.015).rotate(()=>time*0.006)
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.08)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.06)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.03)
  .color(0.4, 0.3, 0.55).brightness(0.03)
  .out(o2)

src(o0)
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.03)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.02)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.3)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.2, 0.015), 0.004)
  .hue(()=>0.004*Math.sin(time*0.01))
  .luma(0.004, 0.05)
  .brightness(0.022)
  .saturate(1.15)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .add(src(o1).mult(src(o2)), 0.12)
  .out(o0)
